subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket with the hood up against the rain and dark trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the wet megacity back-street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears rain-soaked sneakers; the red jacket glowing wet amid the reflected neon, hood raised
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded rain jacket with hood up, dark trousers, wet sneakers, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light with warm undertones, smooth youthful skin wet with rain
subjects.facial_features: Round face shadowed by the raised hood, dark hair, small features

subjects.description: Parked scooters and small cars lining the curbs of the megacity back-street, roofs mirroring the neon in the rain
subjects.appearance_details: Compact hatchbacks and scooters in mixed colors, their wet surfaces awash with reflected signboard light
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A narrow residential back-street in a dense Asian megacity on a heavy monsoon-rain summer night. Low-rise apartment blocks and shophouses with stacked balconies and glowing shopfront signs press close along a two-lane road of wet, mirror-like asphalt. Dense neon and signboard light in many colors reflects in vivid streaks across the rain-soaked pavement. Scooters and small parked cars line the curbs; narrow covered sidewalks run beside the buildings. Heavy rain blurs the crowded backdrop over the drowned center markings.

lighting.conditions: Heavy monsoon rain at night under dense neon
lighting.direction: Multidirectional colored neon and signboard light from close buildings, plus streetlamp pools
lighting.shadows: Soft, multiplied colored shadows blurred and doubled by the rain-mirrored road
lighting.illumination_effect: Dense neon bloom and specular reflections flood the wet street; the child's red jacket glows amid the saturated color, sharpened by the rain

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Saturated multicolored neon reflected on mirror-wet black asphalt, glowing shopfront signs, and a vivid red accent from the child's jacket amid the color
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Dense, humid, neon-drenched monsoon-night bustle cut by sudden braking tension
aesthetics.patterns: Stacked balconies and signboards, parked scooters and cars, streaked neon reflections on the wet road

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and crossing child; neon bloom and heavy rain blur the crowded background

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle rolls forward at a moderate speed down the neon-lit megacity residential back-street in heavy monsoon rain at night.
A small child in a red hooded jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the mirror-wet asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips and headlights streak the wet road.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped in the rain while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the mirror-wet asphalt, partially faded, its reflection smeared with colored neon in the rain
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the neon-drenched megacity back-street in monsoon rain, parked scooters and cars along the mirror-wet curbs.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed over flooded asphalt
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking, tires washing through rain as it decelerates.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips, heavy rain spray
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely amid the neon and rain.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary in the downpour

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam glides forward down a neon-drenched megacity residential back-street in heavy monsoon rain at night, colored signs mirrored on the flooded asphalt. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red hooded jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking on the mirror-wet road, slowing with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the downpour while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Heavy monsoon rain drumming and hissing on wet asphalt, the wash of tires and distant scooters and city bustle, the hum of the vehicle, then wet firm brake and tire friction as it decelerates, settling into an idle beneath the pouring rain.
